close_reason: Implemented reproducibility test for Go and Rust. Python support tracked in turnkey-hsg7.
description:
Implement the missing 07-reproducibility.sh E2E test. This test should verify that builds are reproducible across different environments or runs - a key property for Nix-based toolchains.

Registered in e2e/harness/runner.sh but not yet implemented.
title: E2E: Implement reproducibility test
